name: URL (All Protocols)
description: Detects URLs with various protocols (http, https, ftp, ssh, mysql, smtp, etc.). May contain sensitive information including credentials in the URL, paths, or query parameters.

metadata.note: May contain PII or credentials in query parameters, paths, or authentication strings
metadata.protocols_supported: http, https, ftp, ftps, ssh, sftp, smtp, mysql, postgresql, mongodb, redis, ldap, telnet, and others

effect.message: URL masked, protocol and domain visible
